backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor that combines authorization, blob storage, user profiles, and content (poetry, dua, songs) CRUD operations with admin-only creation, like functionality, user management, and maintenance mode support.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key behaviors of components, pages, and hooks in the application.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite app titled 'Dard-e-munasif' that mounts the React root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for login, home (Mix), poetry, dua, songs, and admin pages, all wrapped in a ThemeProvider and Layout with a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/ContentMan: Admin panel component that lists all poetry, duas, and songs with delete functionality, confirmation dialogs, and cache invalidation via React Query.
frontend/src/components/admin/DuaUploadF: Form component for admins to upload a new Dua with title, content, and optional audio file, tracking upload progress via ExternalBlob.
frontend/src/components/admin/PoetryUplo: Form component for admins to upload poetry with title, content, and an optional image file, tracking upload progress via ExternalBlob.
frontend/src/components/admin/SongUpload: Form component for admins to upload a song with title, artist, and a required audio file, tracking upload progress via ExternalBlob.
frontend/src/components/admin/UsersContr: Admin panel that provides a maintenance mode toggle and a searchable user table with block/unblock actions using React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/AudioPlayer.tsx: Reusable audio player component for dua content that enforces unmuted full-volume playback, manages MediaSession metadata, handles permission checks, and shows a ShieldAlert message when audio permissions are denied.
frontend/src/components/BanScreen.tsx: Full-screen overlay component displayed when a user's account is suspended, showing a ShieldX icon and a suspension message attributed to 'Developer Ikhlas'.
frontend/src/components/DuaPost.tsx: Card component for displaying a dua post that opens a full-screen modal on click and handles audio download to both IndexedDB (via useDownloads) and the browser, with stopPropagation on the download button.
frontend/src/components/FullScreenPostMo: A full-screen modal dialog for displaying Poetry or Dua posts, supporting image display, audio playback, likes count, history tracking, scroll locking, and Escape key dismissal.
frontend/src/components/HamburgerMenu.ts: A slide-out hamburger menu panel that shows browsing history and downloaded audio entries, with play/pause and delete controls for downloads.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout wrapper that handles authentication redirects, ban/maintenance checks via the backend actor, and renders the navigation bar with theme toggle and hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/MaintenanceScree: A full-screen overlay displayed when the app is in maintenance mode, showing an animated wrench icon and a message from the developer.
A full-screen music player modal that auto-plays a selected Song, provides play/pause and seek controls, tracks history, and handles audio permission denial.
frontend/src/components/PINAuthGuard.tsx: A PIN-based authentication guard component that protects admin content, storing session state in sessionStorage and showing a PIN entry card when unauthenticated.
frontend/src/components/PoetryPost.tsx: A card component for displaying a Poetry post with its image, content preview, likes count, and a download button, opening a full-screen modal on click.
frontend/src/components/SongPost.tsx: Renders a song card with inline play/pause controls and opens a full NowPlayingModal on click, using the useAudioPlayback hook for playback state and permission handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioPlayback.ts: Provides a singleton-based global audio playback hook with shared state, supporting play/pause/seek, wake lock management, MediaSession metadata, and audio permission checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloads.ts: Manages offline audio downloads stored in IndexedDB, exposing add, delete, play, and refresh operations with local React state sync.
frontend/src/hooks/useHistory.ts: Tracks playback/view history entries in IndexedDB, providing functions to add timestamped entries and refresh the history list.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, and identity state to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for CRUD operations on Poetry, Dua, Songs, and User records via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebAudioFilters.ts: A stub hook that previously managed Web Audio filter chains but is now fully bypassed (no-op), kept only for import compatibility.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind CSS base styles, CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and Urdu/Devanagari font utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: PIN-guarded admin page with tabbed UI for uploading Poetry, Dua, and Songs, managing existing content, and controlling users.
frontend/src/pages/DuaPage.tsx: Displays a grid of Dua posts fetched via React Query, showing skeleton loaders during loading, an error alert with retry on failure, and an empty state message when no duas exist.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Two-step login page where users enter their name and select a server; generates a stable device fingerprint, registers the user via a mutation, and stores credentials in localStorage before navigating home.
frontend/src/pages/MixPage.tsx: Aggregates poetry, dua, and song content into a single mixed feed sorted by likes, and displays a user identity card showing the stored unique code with a copy button.
frontend/src/pages/PoetryPage.tsx: Displays a grid of Poetry posts fetched via React Query, with skeleton loading states, a destructive error alert with retry, and an empty state fallback.
frontend/src/pages/SongsPage.tsx: Displays a grid of Song posts fetched via React Query, handling loading skeletons, error alerts with retry logic, and an empty state message.
frontend/src/utils/indexedDB.ts: Provides an IndexedDB utility module with functions to initialize the database and perform CRUD operations on 'history' (capped at 50 entries, sorted by timestamp) and 'downloads' (blob storage) object stores.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH color tokens, border radius, font families (Inter and Urdu), accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for 'Dard-e-munasif' multimedia app, documenting version 51, architectural decisions, known backend/frontend bugs, and the full list of existing features undergoing a clean rebuild.
